skill_targets.title: payedge-payment-capture
skill_targets.rationale: PayEdge's payment capture API handles the core transactional flow with idempotency keys, retry semantics, and webhook confirmation — patterns that generic HTTP tooling does not encode.
skill_targets.differentiation_hypothesis: Agents without this skill default to generic REST calls and miss idempotency key requirements, leading to duplicate charges in high-latency scenarios.
skill_targets.existing_competition: Generic HTTP docs do not cover PayEdge-specific retry semantics or idempotency key format.
skill_targets.agentic_landscape: AI-assisted payment reconciliation tools are emerging; agents are beginning to automate refund and capture flows
